__doc__: Worked bench_sweep matrix — recreates the open-item-#6 fade-margin sweep (finding: twin-vis-fade-2026-07-10.md) as a declarative matrix. Runs IN a project whose MATERIALIZED tools/optimize_scene.gd carries the --vis-fade-margin knobs (post feat/vis-fade-margin merge). Sweeps the aggressive (20/60) and coarser (40/120) vis-range size classes x fade OFF / margin 5 (self) / margin 12 (self) over the many-unique-mesh city at street (decisive) + aerial (context). Because this session's presentation is 120 Hz display-capped, a repeat block re-benches every config in INTERLEAVED cycles at street so the merge's cpu is drift-cancelled (bench_sweep auto-suggests exactly this when frame_ms pins at the cap). objects_rendered/draw_calls are deterministic and asserted identical across repeats. scene_in expects the unique-mesh city built at --min-instances=100000; adjust scene_in/out_dir to your project. Keys prefixed __ are ignored by the reader.
